recommendations.title: Skyscraper
recommendations.overview: Framed and on the run, a former FBI agent must save his family from a blazing fire in the world's tallest building.

recommendations.title: We're the Millers
recommendations.overview: A veteran pot dealer creates a fake family as part of his plan to move a huge shipment of weed into the U.S. from Mexico.

recommendations.title: Red Notice
recommendations.overview: An Interpol-issued Red Notice is a global alert to hunt and capture the world's most wanted. But when a daring heist brings together the FBI's top profiler and two rival criminals, there's no telling what will happen.

recommendations.title: Central Intelligence
recommendations.overview: Calvin Joyner, a mild-mannered accountant whose high school glory days are long behind him, reconnects with an awkward pal from high school through Facebook. After meeting up, Calvin’s mundane life takes an unexpectedly thrilling turn when he's thrus

recommendations.title: Big Hero 6
recommendations.overview: A special bond develops between plus-sized inflatable robot Baymax, and prodigy Hiro Hamada, who team up with a group of friends to form a band of high-tech heroes.

recommendations.title: The Sea Beast
recommendations.overview: When a young girl stows away on the ship of a legendary sea monster hunter, they launch an epic journey into uncharted waters — and make history to boot.

recommendations.title: The Comebacks
recommendations.overview: Out-of-luck coach Lambeau Fields takes a rag-tag bunch of college misfits and drives them towards the football championships. In the process, this life-long loser discovers that he is a winner after all by redeeming himself, saving his relationship w

recommendations.title: Willy Wonka & the Chocolate Factory
recommendations.overview: When eccentric candy man Willy Wonka promises a lifetime supply of sweets and a tour of his chocolate factory to five lucky kids, penniless Charlie Bucket seeks the golden ticket that will make him a winner.

recommendations.title: La Maison en Petits Cubes
recommendations.overview: La Maison en Petits Cubes tells the story of a grandfather's memories as he adds more blocks to his house to stem the flooding waters.

recommendations.title: Bolt
